creator: tota@FreeBSD.org
text:
2012/2/22 okuoku <okuoku@gmail.com>:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/158968; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: okuoku <okuoku@gmail.com>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org, mjt@cltn.org
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/158968: Update port: lang/mosh version 0.2.7
> Date: Wed, 22 Feb 2012 22:19:33 +0900
>
>  > To make sure, have you installed with NOPORTDATA
>  > to confirm mosh as follows?
>  >
>  > # make NOPORTDATA=yes install
>
>  OK. It works except mosh-config command. mosh-config requires several
>  mosh libraries which dropped with NOPORTDATA=yes.

I see.
Considering FreeBSD file system hierarchy, we should not install lib contents
to PREFIX/share/mosh but install them to PREFIX/lib/mosh
as well as perl, ruby, python and so on.

So I re-modify my patch attached to this e-mail, please confirm it.
See also http://redports.org/browser/tota/lang/mosh .

>  > By the way, have you heard from maintainer(katsuji.ishikawa@gmail.com)?
>
>  Nope.
>
>  > If you have not yet, I hope that you become this port maintainer.
>
>  OK.

Thank you very much.

-- 
TAKATSU Tomonari
